category_sources: Official repository https://github.com/mono0926/LicensePlist describes LicensePlist as a command-line tool that generates Plist files of dependency licenses for app Settings.
source_facts.description says LicensePlist generates dependency license lists for iOS applications.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/mono0926/LicensePlist uses the display name LicensePlist.
docs_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/mono0926/LicensePlist#readme contains usage and option documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/mono0926/LicensePlist; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository https://github.com/mono0926/LicensePlist lists cli, ios, settings, automation, xcode, license, and license-management topics.
source_facts.description identifies iOS dependency license list generation.
